1000604518.korean: - 애타게 주위를 둘러봐도 눈에 초점이 없는 메이드들 뿐이다.

1000604519.english: The Master promised to entrust everything to me. Now, I am... the head maid here.
1000604519.korean: 주인께선 제게 모든 것을 맡긴다고 약조하셨사옵니다. &n이제 제가... 이곳의 메이드 장이옵니다.

1000604520.english: I do not wish to be rude, but... I cannot think of any other way...
1000604520.korean: 무례하게 굴고 싶진 않사옵니다만... 소첩에겐 다른 방법이 떠오르지 않기에...

1000604521.english: - Sowan... started filling the syringe with tea.

1000604522.english: Are you ready to accept supreme pleasure?

1000604523.english: - Why won't that guy listen to me? I…
1000604523.korean: - 저녀석은 어째서 내 말을 듣질 않는거지? 난…

1000604524.english: Haha. That is because Master is lying to this humble servant.
1000604524.korean: 후후. 그건 주인께서 소첩에게 거짓말을 하고 계시기 때문이옵니다.

1000604525.english: - Sowan skillfully injected a syringe filled with tea into my neck.
1000604525.korean: - 소완은 노련한 솜씨로 내 목에 차가 담긴 주사기를 찔러 넣었다.

1000604526.english: Have you felt a little more at ease...?

1000604527.english: - Is it because of 'that thing' Sowan injected? My mood is sinking quickly.
1000604527.korean: - 소완이 주사한 '저것' 때문인가? 기분이 빠르게 가라앉는다.

1000604528.english: ...I am hurt... Master, you keep saying things you do not mean...
1000604528.korean: ...소첩은 서운하옵니다... 주인께서 자꾸만 마음에도 없는 소리를 하시니...

1000604530.english: - Yes... Sowan... I need you. Please don't leave me.
1000604530.korean: - 그래... 소완... 난 네가 필요해. 날 떠나지 말아줘.

1000604531.english: - I can feel Sowan's soft hair on my face.

1000604532.english: - This is the last memory of today...

1000604535.english: - My head is clear, and for the first time in a while, I feel full of vitality.
1000604535.korean: - 머리는 맑고, 오랜만에 몸에 생기가 돈다.

1000604536.english: - Sowan, who had been bothering me for days, was nowhere to be seen, and next to me, cute bioroids were looking down at me with worried faces.
1000604536.korean: - 며칠째 날 괴롭히던 소완은 보이질 않고, 내 옆엔 귀여운 바이오로이드&n들이 걱정스런 얼굴로 나를 내려다 보고 있었다.

1000604538.english: - Instead of answering, I stroked Hachiko's head.
1000604538.korean: - 나는 대답대신 하치코의 머리를 쓰다듬어 주었다.

1000604539.english: That's a relief! Hachiko was so worried about her master...

1000604540.english: Hachiko. We don't have much time, so stay away for a while.
1000604540.korean: 하치코. 시간이 별로 없으니, 잠깐 떨어져 있어.

1000604541.english: Ah, yeah. Perrault is holding Sowan captive right now. She won't be able to keep her around for long.
1000604541.korean: 아, 응. 페로가 지금 소완을 붙잡아 두고 있어. 오래 벌진 못할거야.

1000604543.english: Ah, Commander, you're hungry, aren't you? First... would you like to try this? I made it myself, so I'm not very confident about it... but please eat it while you listen to what I say.
1000604543.korean: 아, 사령관 배고프지? 우선... 이것부터 먹어볼래? 내가 만든거라&n자신은 없지만... 일단 먹으면서 내가 하는 말 잘 들어.

1000604544.english: - I hurriedly stuffed the tuna rice ball the Dutch girl handed me into my mouth and focused on the story.
1000604544.korean: - 난 더치걸이 건네준 참치주먹밥을 급히 입에 쑤셔넣고 이야기에 집중했다.

1000604545.english: This happened less than a week ago.

1000604546.english: Sowan joined Orca when the Commander rescued the Bioroids captured by the Iron bug.
1000604546.korean: 소완은 사령관이 철충들에게 잡힌 바이오로이드를 구출할 때 오르카로 합류했어.

1000604547.english: Sowan introduced herself as a 'wandering chef.' Even though she looks like that now, back then she seemed like a pretty polite maid.
1000604547.korean: 소완은 자기가 '방랑 요리사'라고 소개했어. 저래뵈도 그땐 꽤 예의 바른&n메이드처럼 보였거든.

1000604548.english: No, Master! You really liked it back then!
1000604548.korean: 아녜요, 주인님! 주인님은 그때 엄청 좋아 하셨어요!

1000604549.english: Well… anyway, the real problem started back then.
1000604549.korean: 뭐… 아무튼 진짜 문제는 그 때 부터 시작됐어.

1000604550.english: Sowan won everyone's favor with her cooking skills and blow away their wariness in one fell swoop. Even the suspicious Constantia fell for it...
1000604550.korean: 소완은 저 요리솜씨로 모두의 환심을 샀고, 경계심을 한방에 날려버렸어.&n그 의심 많던 콘스탄챠까지 넘어갔으니...

1000604552.english: Yes, that's right! You remember! That car was the problem!
1000604552.korean: 네, 맞아요! 기억하시는군요! 그 차가 문제였어요!

1000604553.english: Everyone goes blank when they drink the tea Sowan gives!
1000604553.korean: 소완이 주는 차를 마시면 모두가 멍해져요!

1000604554.english: Hachiko didn't want to drink, but Master ordered everyone... 'Do not refuse the tea offered by Sowan'...
1000604554.korean: 하치코는 마시기 싫었는데 주인님이 모두에게 명령하셨는걸요...&n'소완이 주는 차를 거절하지 말라'고...

1000604556.english: Haa... You really don't remember a single thing, Commander...
1000604556.korean: 하아… 정말 하나도 기억 못 하는구나, 사령관...

1000604557.english: Waaah! It's an Iron bug attack! How can we...
1000604557.korean: 흐앙! 철충의 습격이에요! 우리 위치를 어떻게...

1000604558.english: Hachiko! Tell the Battle Maid! I'm going to look for Constantia!
1000604558.korean: 하치코! 배틀메이드들에게 알려! 난 콘스탄챠를 찾아볼게!

1000604559.english: Master, you must stay in a safe place! Hachiko will be back!
1000604559.korean: 주인님, 안전한곳으로 피해계셔야 해요! 하치코 다녀오겠습니다!

1000604560.english: - Dutch Girl. Hachiko. Everyone is in danger. We must hurry to the command console.
1000604560.korean: - 더치걸이. 하치코가. 모두가 위험하다. 서둘러 지휘 콘솔로 가야한다.

1000604561.english: - But... I felt a chilling sensation grabbing the nape of my neck from behind... It must be Sowan...
1000604561.korean: - 하지만... 뒷쪽에서 내 목덜미를 잡아 채는 서늘한 기운이 느껴졌다…&n분명히 소완이겠지...

1000604562.english: - "Are you planning to pull a stunt even in this dangerous situation?" Now, anger was welling up inside me.
1000604562.korean: - 대원들이 위험한 이 상황에서도 수작을 부릴 생각인건가?&n이제는 화가 치밀어 올랐다.

1000604563.english: Now, only the two of us remain...

1000604564.english: - "Commanding the battle is the top priority right now." A deep smile spread across the corners of Sowan's mouth as she felt ignored.
1000604564.korean: - 지금은 전투 지휘가 최우선이다. 무시당한 소완의 입꼬리에 진한 미소가 걸렸다.

1000604565.english: Haha. That is an excellent judgment. Seeing a master like this, I feel I will be even less able to bear it.
1000604565.korean: 후후. 훌륭하신 판단이시옵니다. 이런 주인을 보고 있자니,&n저는 더욱 참을 수 없을 것 같사옵니다.

1000604567.english: - I'll hear the details after the battle is over. The battle is the priority right now.
1000604567.korean: - 자세한건 전투가 끝난 뒤에 듣겠어. 지금은 전투가 우선이야.

1000604568.english: Get away from your master immediately. This is your final warning.

1000604569.english: - There was a slight change in her expression, but Sowan soon wore a faint smile and approached me.
1000604569.korean: - 약간의 표정 변화가 있었지만, 소완은 곧 옅은 미소를 띄우고&n내게 다가왔다.

1000604570.english: ... I desire only my master's favor. Please, this soup...
1000604570.korean: ... 소첩은 주인의 총애만을 바랄 뿐이옵니다. 부디 이 수프를...

1000604571.english: - I threw the food Sowan handed me, plate and all.
1000604571.korean: - 난 소완이 건네준 음식을 접시째로 집어 던졌다.

1000604572.english: Grrr! Master, are you alright?! Hachiko is here!

1000604573.english: - It seems the team members, worried about my safety, hurried back. I feel a surge of admiration.
1000604573.korean: - 내 신변을 걱정한 대원들이 서둘러 복귀한 모양이다. &n기특한 마음이 차오른다.

1000604574.english: To be treated like this... I feel as if I were a sinner.
1000604574.korean: 이런 취급을 받다니... 마치 제가 죄인이라도 된 기분이옵니다.

1000604575.english: Explain everything in front of your master. What is your purpose for coming here?
1000604575.korean: 주인님 앞에서 전부 설명 하시죠. 여기 온 목적이 뭐죠?

1000604576.english: Come on, come on! Tell me! You manipulated us, didn't you? You scammer! Are you even a bioroid?
1000604576.korean: 어서 어서! 말해봐요! 우릴 조종했죠? 이 사기꾼!&n바이오로이드는 맞는 거예요?

1000604577.english: - At the mention of being a swindler, a dangerous aura emanated from Sowan. However, as long as Perrault and Hachiko are by my side, there is nothing to fear.
1000604577.korean: - 사기꾼이라는 말에 소완에게서 위험한 기세가 뿜어져 나왔다. &n하지만 페로와 하치코가 곁에 있는 이상 두려울건 없다.

1000604578.english: ...What did you just say to me?

1000604579.english: Sowan is a scammer! She really bossed Hachiko around!

1000604580.english: - Sowan opened her mouth with difficulty.

1000604581.english: ...I feel wronged. Why must I be treated this way...
1000604581.korean: ...억울하옵니다. 소첩이 어째서 이런 취급을 받아야 하는지요...

1000604582.english: I have come to find the one to whom I shall devote my entire being.
1000604582.korean: 소첩은 이 한몸 바쳐 모실 분을 찾아왔사옵니다.

1000604583.english: My master sincerely welcomed me. Do you remember?
1000604583.korean: 그런 저를 주인님께서는 진심으로 반겨 주셨습니다. 기억하십니까?

1000604584.english: No. I will do it accurately for you.

1000604585.english: "I'm sick of bioroids that only feed me tuna. Welcome, Sowan," he said.
1000604585.korean: "내게 참치만 먹이는 바이오로이드들에게 질렸어. 어서와, 소완." &n이라고 하셨사옵니다.

1000604587.english: - The ship was filled with heavy silence.

1000604588.english: - The bioroids were staring only at my face.

1000604590.english: Yes, Sowan is right. The Master certainly said so.
1000604590.korean: 네, 그건 소완의 말이 맞습니다. 주인님은 분명 그렇게 말씀 하셨습니다.

1000604592.english: I have restored your nutritional status to normal, Master, and bestowed upon you every pleasure that can be felt through taste.
1000604592.korean: 소첩은 주인님의 영양상태를 정상으로 회복시키고, 미각으로 느낄 수 있는&n모든 쾌락을 선사해 드렸사옵니다.

1000604593.english: How could you treat a humble servant like this?

1000604594.english: - ...It's a checkmate. It seems the initial mistake lies with me. I don't remember, though...
1000604594.korean: - ...외통수다. 최초의 잘못은 내게 있는 듯하다. 기억은 나지 않지만...

1000604596.english: That... Master is right! Sowan manipulated us with food. She was mean! Kick her out immediately, Master!
1000604596.korean: 그건... 주인님의 말이 맞아요! 소완은 음식으로 우릴 조종했어요.&n나빴어요! 어서 내쫓으세요, 주인님!

1000604597.english: Everyone has highly praised my cooking. Weren't you the ones who said you wanted to have cooking skills like mine?
1000604597.korean: 모두들 제 음식을 극찬했사옵니다. 저와 같은 요리 실력을 갖고 싶다고 한 건 당신들이 아니었는지요.

1000604599.english: have passed on my precious knowledge to the maids who could not even properly prepare ingredients. Now... I, too, can no longer bear it.
1000604599.korean: 재료 손질조차 제대로 하지 못하던 메이드들에게 제 소중한 지식을 전수했사옵니다.&n이제는... 저도 더이상 참을 수 없사옵니다.

1000604600.english: - Sowan checked her armor out of the corner of her eye. It's dangerous. For now...
1000604600.korean: - 소완은 곁눈질로 자신의 무장을 확인했다. 위험해. 일단...

1000604604.english: - Damn it. Now I don't know either.

1000604605.english: - The ship was once again filled with heavy silence.
1000604605.korean: - 함내는 또 다시 무거운 침묵으로 가득찼다.

1000604606.english: ... I must have heard wrong. Did you say a cooking competition?
1000604606.korean: ... 소첩이 잘못 들었사옵니다. 요리 대회라 하셨사옵니까?

1000604607.english: - Hachiko let her tail hang limply. I could see Perrault's pupils narrowing. I didn't know what was going on either, but I just pushed ahead.
1000604607.korean: - 하치코는 꼬리를 축 늘어뜨렸다. 페로의 동공이 얇아지는게 보인다.&n나도 뭐가 뭔지 모르겠지만 일단 밀어붙였다.

1000604608.english: - I could have just kicked Sowan out. But... why am I causing such a mess?
1000604608.korean: - 소완을 내쫓으면 될 일이었다. 하지만. 난 어쩌자고 이런 일을 벌리는걸까.

1000604609.english: - ... I remembered. It must be because Sowan's sad face came to mind when I threw her food.
1000604609.korean: - ... 기억났다. 그건 분명 내가 소완의 음식을 집어던졌을때&n소완의 슬픈 얼굴이 떠올랐기 때문이겠지.

1000604610.english: As for Hachiko... I think we just need to send Sowan back...
1000604610.korean: 하치코는... 그냥 소완을 돌려 보내면 될거라 생각해요...

1000604611.english: If Master says so, I don't mind. That sounds fun.
1000604611.korean: 주인님이 그렇게 말씀하신다면. 전 상관 없어요. 재밌겠네요.

1000604612.english: - Perrault licks my hand and glances at me. Deep-hearted Perrault, perhaps she read my thoughts to some extent?
1000604612.korean: - 손을 핥으며 날 힐끗 쳐다보는 페로. 속 깊은 페로는 어쩌면 내 생각을 어느 정도 읽은 게 아닐까?

1000604613.english: But Hachiko isn't confident in her cooking...

1000604614.english: Are you serious? Those maids are no match for me. Are you trying to insult me?
1000604614.korean: 진심이시옵니까? 저 메이드들은 제 상대가 되질 못하옵니다.&n제게 모욕을 주시려는건지요?

1000604615.english: Ha... Hachiko can't cook, but she can beat the bad chef!
1000604615.korean: 하... 하치코는 요리 못하지만, 나쁜 요리사는 이길 수 있어요!

1000604617.english: I will repay this humiliation slowly. You beasts of the Companion...
1000604617.korean: 이 굴욕은 천천히 갚아 드리지요. 컴패니언의 축생들...

1000604618.english: - And so, a hopeless cooking competition unfolded in Orca...
1000604618.korean: - 이렇게 오르카에선 대책없는 요리 대회가 펼쳐지게 됐다...

1000604619.english: - It is a heartwarming sight no matter when I see it. To think those cute girls are waiting only for my orders...
1000604619.korean: - 언제 봐도 흐뭇한 광경이다. 저 귀여운 소녀들이 내 명령만을 기다리고있다니...

1000604620.english: - And how did you hear the rumor...

1000604621.english: - Even Fotia and Constantia are attending this wild competition, their eyes shining.
1000604621.korean: - 이 막나가는 대회에 포티아와 콘스탄챠까지 참석해서 눈을 빛내고 있다.

1000604622.english: - Ah, if only this moment would last forever...

1000604624.english: Some sisters even put aside their exploration missions to attend here. Please use your brains.
1000604624.korean: 몇몇 자매들은 탐사 임무도 미뤄두고 이곳에 참석했습니다.&n부디 뇌로는 생각을 해주시길.

1000604625.english: - As expected, vanilla is scary. Let's hurry up and proceed.
1000604625.korean: - 역시 바닐라는 무섭다. 서둘러 진행하도록 하자.

1000604627.english: - Vanilla shook her head and moved to the back seat where Sowan and Constantia were.
1000604627.korean: - 바닐라는 고개를 저으며 소완과 콘스탄챠가 있는 뒷좌석으로 자리를 옮겼다.

1000604629.english: What, Commander? To think you were doing something this fun behind my back. I'm disappointed.
1000604629.korean: 뭐야, 사령관. 나 몰래 이렇게 재밌는걸 하고 있었다니. 실망이야.

1000604630.english: Kyaaang! It's Miho~! How have you been?

1000604631.english: Hi, Hachiko~ I'm doing well. But... Hachiko, it looks like you've gained some weight lately? It's just lack of exercise, lack of exercise~
1000604631.korean: 안녕, 하치코~ 난 잘 지내지. 그런데... 하치코는 요즘 살이 좀 찐 것 같네?&n운동부족이야, 운동부족~

1000604633.english: Well, anyway, since I've become a judge, I'll quickly get this done in place of the slow commander.
1000604633.korean: 뭐, 아무튼간에 심사위원이 됐으니까, 느림보 사령관을 대신해서 내가 얼른얼른 진행할게.

1000604634.english: Okay, the first menu item is!

1000604637.english: You're going to make an amazing [c][57e137]chocolate cake[-][/c]. Just so you know, there's a time limit, so everyone should hurry!
1000604637.korean: 끝내주는 [c][57e137]초코케이크[-][/c]를 만들어 오는거야. 참고로 시간 제한도 있으니까 모두 서둘러야 할 걸?

1000604639.english: ... Alright. I'll go first, Slowpoke Hachiko.
1000604639.korean: ... 좋아. 나 먼저 갈게, 느림보 하치코.

1000604641.english: - Turning my gaze to the bridge, I see that Sowan has already left her post as well. Did she go to get some materials?
1000604641.korean: - 함교로 눈을 돌리자 소완도 벌써 자리를 비운 상태다. 재료를 구하러 간걸까?

1000604642.english: Hachiko, there's no time to rush. Time is ticking away. Well then, I'll go take my time cleaning my gun.
1000604642.korean: 하치코, 허둥댈 시간 없어. 시간이 계속 가고 있다구.&n그럼 난 느긋하게 총기 손질이나 하러 가야지~

1000604643.english: Um... I know where the legendary cacao is. W-would you like to follow me?
1000604643.korean: 저... 전설의 카카오가 있는곳을 알고 있어요. 따... 따라 오실래요?

1000604644.english: To think Miss Fotia knew, as the head maid of Orca, I can't lose! Master, please wait for me.
1000604644.korean: 포티아양도 알고 계셨다니, 오르카의 메이드 장으로서 질 수 없죠!&n주인님, 부디 저를 기다려 주세요.

1000604645.english: Everyone, make sure to arm yourself well, as you must face the evil Iron Bugs guarding the legendary Cacao!
1000604645.korean: 전설의 카카오를 지키는 사악한 철충들을 상대해야 하니 모두 무장을 단단히 챙기세요!

1000604646.english: - How much is the truth and how much is the legend...

1000604647.english: Well... legends, evil Iron Bugs... it doesn't really matter. Hachiko?
1000604647.korean: 뭐... 전설이니, 사악한 철충이니... 아무래도 상관 없지만. 하치코?

1000604649.english: Do you know what Kakao is? I really have no idea what's what...
1000604649.korean: 카카오가 뭔지 알고있어? 난 대체 뭐가 뭔지...

1000604650.english: Even Hachiko doesn't know what cacao is...

1000604651.english: As expected, Master, you are the smartest! Let's go, Dutch! Let's go!
1000604651.korean: 역시 주인님이 제일 똑똑하세요! 같이 가요 더치! 출발출발!

1000604652.english: I... I'll just follow Hachiko. Please take care of me.
1000604652.korean: 나, 난 하치코만 따라갈게. 잘 부탁해.

1000604654.english: Haa... I just wanted to rest a little...
1000604654.korean: 하아... 난 그냥 조금 쉬고 싶었을 뿐인데...

1000604655.english: Everyone's working hard, huh? The Commander is more popular than he looks?
1000604655.korean: 다들 열심히네? 사령관 보기보다 인기 많구나?

1000604656.english: You mean Sowan? Hahaha, you know I'm monitoring the Commander with the scope, right?
1000604656.korean: 소완 말이야? 아하하, 내가 스코프로 사령관을 감시하는건 알고 있지?

1000604657.english: Anyway, I was also keeping an eye on Sowan playing games with the maids. I was planning to give her a good smack on the head if she did anything suspicious, but...
1000604657.korean: 아무튼, 소완이 메이드들을 가지고 놀고 있었던 것도 체크하고 있었어.&n소완이 수상한 짓을 한다면 머리에 빵! 해줄 생각이었지만...

1000604658.english: Come to think of it, it's good for Orca, isn't it? Because they've finally recruited a skilled chef.
1000604658.korean: 생각해 보면 오르카에 좋은거잖아? 드디어 실력 좋은 요리사가 영입된 거니까.

1000604659.english: Hehehe. As long as I can eat something delicious, that's all I need.
1000604659.korean: 에헤헤. 난 맛있는걸 먹을 수 있으면 그걸로 오케이야.

1000604661.english: - Miho looks and acts just like...

1000604662.english: Okay, okay~ I'll support the maids so they can focus on the competition.
1000604662.korean: 알았어, 알았어~ 메이드들이 대회에 집중할 수 있도록 지원 해줄게.

1000604663.english: Anyway, thanks. Thanks to you, things seem to be going well.
1000604663.korean: 아무튼 고마워. 덕분에 일이 재밌게 흘러가는것 같네.

1000604664.english: It's basically the same thing. Stop being so cute and sulky~ Hehe. Well then, I'm off? Leave the conducting to me~
1000604664.korean: 그게 그거지, 뭐. 자꾸 귀엽게 툴툴대지 말구~ 후훗. 그럼 난 간다? 지휘 부탁해~

1000604665.english: I'm well aware of that much... Anyway, I'll take care of it, Commander.
1000604665.korean: 그 정도는 잘 알고있으니까... 아무튼 신경쓸게, 사령관.

1000604666.english: - Cacao requires fermentation and drying processes.

1000604667.english: - It was originally a task that would take over ten days, but due to time constraints, Fortune somehow managed to handle it using a drying device she quickly put together.
1000604667.korean: - 원래 십수일이 걸리는 작업이지만, 시간관계상 포츈이 뚝딱 만들어낸 건조장치로 어떻게든 처리해 줬다.

1000604668.english: Oh my, this older sister wants to help her younger siblings work hard. I want everything to go well for them.
1000604668.korean: 어머, 이 언니는 동생들이 열심히 하는걸 도와주고 싶거든? 모두 잘 됐으면&n좋겠거든.

1000604669.english: I have something to do, so I have to leave first. Good luck, Commander.
1000604669.korean: 난 일이 있어서 먼저 가봐야 되거든? 행운을 빌어, 우리 사령관.

1000604670.english: Commander, can you smell the cake baking? I love it~ Everyone is really working hard.
1000604670.korean: 사령관, 케익 굽는 냄새나지? 너무 좋아~ 다들 정말 열심이네.

1000604671.english: - I definitely think the sight of dough splattered like this is much better than seeing the traces of battle on the maids' aprons.
1000604671.korean: - 확실히 메이드들의 앞치마에 묻은 전투의 흔적을 보는 것 보다는&n이렇게 반죽이 튄 모습이 훨씬 보기 좋다고 생각한다.

1000604672.english: - ...But was cooking dough always this smoky?
1000604672.korean: - ...그런데 반죽을 익히는건 이렇게 연기가 많이 나는 작업이었나?

1000604674.english: Ah! Hachiko will put out the fire! Please take good care of the cake Hachiko made!
1000604674.korean: 으앗! 불은 하치코가 끌게! 하치코가 만든 케이크를 잘 살펴주세요!

1000604675.english: H-Hachiko...? This isn't a chocolate cake... it's meat... isn't it?
1000604675.korean: 하, 하치코...? 이건 초코 케익이 아니라... 고기… 네요?

1000604676.english: Ahaha, I really have no idea what's going on.
1000604676.korean: 아하하, 정말 뭐가 일어나고 있는지 하나도 모르겠어.

1000604677.english: - Miho giggled happily even amidst the chaos.
1000604677.korean: - 미호는 이런 혼란 속에서도 즐거운듯 깔깔대며 웃었다.

1000604678.english: - Time passed like that. Because of the smoke filling the ship, Fortune grumbled as she went to fix the ventilation system.
1000604678.korean: - 그렇게 시간이 흘렀다. 함내에 가득한 연기 때문에 포츈은 툴툴대며&n환기 시설을 손보러 갔다.

1000604679.english: Cough, cough... It's roughly sorted out now, right?
1000604679.korean: 콜록, 콜록… 이제 대충 정리 된거지?

1000604680.english: Alright then! Let's begin the evaluation! First, I'll taste Constantia's cake.
1000604680.korean: 자! 그럼 심사를 시작하겠습니다!&n먼저 콘스탄챠의 케익부터 맛을 보겠어요.

1000604681.english: I can't lose. Because I am Master's keeper.
1000604681.korean: 질 수 없어요. 주인님의 키퍼는 바로 저니까요.

1000604682.english: Hmm... it's... just an average taste, isn't it? There's nothing particularly wrong with it, but nothing special either...
1000604682.korean: 음... 뭔가... 무난한 맛인걸? 딱히 흠 잡을 것도 없지만 특별한 것도...

1000604683.english: It was a flawless cake! I'll give it 6 points.

1000604684.english: Next up is Miss Fotia's... What could this be... It's 'something that has hardened pitch black.' Like a true judge, I will fearlessly take a taste~
1000604684.korean: 다음은 포티아양의... 뭘까요 이건... '새카맣게 굳어버린 무언가' 네요.&n심사위원답게 겁도 없이 맛을 보겠습니다~

1000604686.english: 4 points...? No, I'll give you 3 points.

1000604687.english: The thing is... when you heat sugar, the caramel... *sob*... actually, I... failed to control the heat...
1000604687.korean: 그게... 설탕을 가열하면 카라멜이... &n흑... 사실 화력 조절을... 실패했어요오...

1000604688.english: Since Orca has a perfectly good oven, it might be a good idea to make good use of it.
1000604688.korean: 오르카엔 멀쩡한 오븐이 있으니까 그걸 적극 활용해 보는게 좋을지도 모르겠네요.

1000604689.english: Next up! It's Perrault's white chocolate cake, isn't it?

1000604690.english: Amazing! It was a perfect chocolate cake.

1000604691.english: That's the point. I'll give it a 7!

1000604692.english: - witnessed Miho quickly wrapping Perrault's cake and putting it into the magazine pouch.
1000604692.korean: - 나는 미호가 빠른 손놀림으로 페로의 케익을 포장해서 탄창 파우치에&n집어넣는것을 목격했다.

1000604694.english: Hehe, thanks. Alright then, what's next~? Hachiko's... Hachiko's...
1000604694.korean: 히힛, 고마워. 자, 그럼 다음은~? 하치코의... 하치코의...

1000604696.english: Wow! Hachiko worked hard on this!

1000604697.english: Yes, you are eliminated! Because the theme was chocolate cake!

1000604698.english: Waaah, what should I do... Did it not taste good by any chance...?

1000604699.english: Hehe~ If it tastes good to you, Master, that’s all I need.
1000604699.korean: 헤헤~ 주인님이 맛있다면 전 그걸로 좋아요.

1000604700.english: Ahaha... Th-let's move on to the next. Shall we taste the Dutch Girl's cake?
1000604700.korean: 아하하... 다,다음으로 넘어가죠. 더치걸의 케익을 맛볼까요?

1000604702.english: Hmm, that's a great cake. It's amazing. Maybe Dutch Girl has a talent for cooking?
1000604702.korean: 음, 훌륭한 케익이에요. 놀라워요. 더치걸은 요리에 소질이 있을지도?

1000604703.english: Lies... To think I have a talent. That can't be true.
1000604703.korean: 거짓말... 내가 소질이 있다니. 그럴 리 없잖아.

1000604704.english: Be confident. I can guarantee it. I'll give you a 6!
1000604704.korean: 자신감을 가져요. 제가 보증할 수 있어요. 6점 드릴게요!

1000604706.english: I... I... No. Thank you, both...

1000604707.english: Next up~! We will taste the masterpiece of the chocolate cake master, Vanilla.
1000604707.korean: 다음은~! 초코케익의 장인. 바닐라의 작품을 시식하겠습니다.

1000604708.english: Yeah... it's a preservative-treated product. And from a pretty famous company at that...
1000604708.korean: 응... 방부 처리된 제품이네. 그것도 꽤 유명했던 회사의...

1000604710.english: Ah, um... no. Vanilla, did I do something wrong by any chance...?
1000604710.korean: 아, 음... 아냐. 바닐라, 혹시 내가 뭔가 잘못한거라도 있어...?

1000604711.english: ...I just want to know what Sowan's ulterior motive is. That's all for now.
1000604711.korean: ...저는 소완이 무슨 꿍꿍이인지 알고 싶을 뿐입니다. 그럼 이만.

1000604712.english: Th-that's right. Using a product like this is cheating. Unfortunately, Vanilla is eliminated!
1000604712.korean: 그, 그래. 이런 제품을 쓰는 건 반칙이야.&n바닐라는 아쉽게도 탈락입니다!

1000604714.english: Vegetables... it's cake... Why is everyone doing this to me...?
1000604714.korean: 채소... 케익이네요... 다들 나한테 왜 이러는거야…?

1000604715.english: Judge, would you please taste my cake?
1000604715.korean: 심사위원님, 제 케익의 맛을 봐 주시겠사옵니까?

1000604716.english: It's true, isn't it? It's really delicious! But why did you go to all this trouble?
1000604716.korean: 정말이잖아? 정말 맛있어요! 그런데 왜 이런 수고를 했나요?

1000604717.english: Hmph. I guess you weren't confident you could win by the straight path.
1000604717.korean: 흥. 정공법으로는 이길 자신이 없었나 보군요.

1000604718.english: It would be best not to underestimate the impact that performance has on taste.
1000604718.korean: 퍼포먼스가 맛에 끼치는 영향을 무시하지 않으시는 게 좋사옵니다.

1000604719.english: Besides, as a chef, I wouldn't be in the mood to defeat you all with something ordinary. Then... I shall take my leave.
1000604719.korean: 그리고 요리사인 제가 평범한 것으로 여러분을 꺾어봤자 흥이 나지 않기에.&n그럼... 소첩은 이만 물러나겠사옵니다.

1000604720.english: Well, certainly... Sowan's cake was the best, Commander.
1000604720.korean: 뭐, 확실히... 소완의 케익이 제일 맛있었어, 사령관.

1000604722.english: 9 points... It was perfect. I've never had a cake tastier than this.
1000604722.korean: 9점... 완벽했어. 이것보다 맛있는 케익은 먹어본적이 없어.

1000604723.english: - Vanilla, who appeared from somewhere, frowned after tasting Sowan's cake.
1000604723.korean: - 어디선가 나타난 바닐라는 소완의 케익을 맛본 뒤 얼굴을 찡그렸다.

1000604725.english: No, Vanilla is already eliminated... Well, anyway, it looks like the winner is decided.
1000604725.korean: 아니, 바닐라는 이미 탈락인데...&n뭐, 어쨌든 승자는 결정난 것 같네.

1000604726.english: The winner is Sowan. Everyone, give it a round of applause! Well then, I'm off. See you next time.
1000604726.korean: 승자는 소완이에요. 다들 박수~! 난 그럼 갈게. 다음에 봐.

1000604727.english: - Sowan simply bowed her head demurely from where she was sitting. She showed no particular reaction.
1000604727.korean: - 소완은 앉은 자리에서 다소곳하게 고개를 숙였을 뿐. 별다른 반응을 보이지&n않았다.

1000604728.english: - Some of the maids could not hide their resentful expressions and seemed to be waiting for the next topic.
1000604728.korean: - 몇몇 메이드들은 분한 표정을 숨기지 못하고, 다음 주제를 기다리는 눈치였다.

1000604729.english: - The theme for the next showdown has been decided as meatballs. The reason is that the special judge is none other than this person.
1000604729.korean: - 다음 대결의 주제는 미트볼로 결정됐다. &n그 이유는 특별 심사 위원이 바로 이분이니까.

1000604730.english: Your Excellency the Commander, I report my return to Valkyrie.

1000604731.english: Ah, it's Valkyrie! When did you get back?

1000604732.english: - Valkyrie smiled, accepted Hachiko's greeting, and turned to the waiting maids.
1000604732.korean: - 발키리는 미소지으며 하치코의 인사를 받아주곤 기다리는 메이드들에게 몸을 돌렸다.

1000604733.english: I am Valkyrie, serving as a judge as Your Excellency ordered.

1000604734.english: I will tell you the topic. The topic is 'The Taste of My Hometown'.
1000604734.korean: 주제를 말씀 드리겠습니다, 주제는 '저희 고향의 맛' 입니다.

1000604735.english: I would like to ask you all to take the meatballs I was eating with my comrades. Now, I have a mission, so I will be away for a moment.
1000604735.korean: 여러분들께 전우들과 취식하던 미트볼을 부탁드리겠습니다.&n그럼 저는 임무가 있어서 잠시 자리를 비우겠습니다.

1000604736.english: - Valkyrie disappeared into the sortie port after revealing only the topic. Where is she going in such a hurry? Anyway... the topic is decided, but what about the Bioroids?
1000604736.korean: - 발키리는 주제만 밝힌 뒤 출격 포트로 사라졌다. 어딜 저리 급하게 가는걸까?&n그나저나... 주제는 정해졌고, 바이오로이드들은?

1000604737.english: - "It's Sowan." Sowan disappeared the fastest to gather materials. Constantia and Perrault, who were skilled in cooking, followed behind.
1000604737.korean: - 소완이군. 소완이 가장 빨리 소재를 구하러 사라졌다. &n요리에 능숙한 콘스탄챠, 페로가 그 뒤를 따랐다.

1000604738.english: Master! Hachiko can do it well this time!
1000604738.korean: 주인님! 하치코는 이번엔 잘 할 수 있어요!

1000604739.english: Hehe~! Thank you for the petting. I'll be back!

1000604740.english: This is troublesome. Meatballs? I've never heard of that dish... Fotia, may I borrow your cookbook?
1000604740.korean: 곤란하네. 미트볼? 처음 듣는 요리야... 포티아, 요리책을 빌려가도 될까?

1000604741.english: Of course. Let's work hard together. But... if I make a mistake again this time, I...
1000604741.korean: 물론이에요. 같이 열심히 해봐요. 그렇지만... 이번에도 실수하면 전...

1000604742.english: Anyone can do better than me.

1000604743.english: D-Please don't say that. We can both do well!
1000604743.korean: 그... 그런 말씀 마세요. 저희 둘 다 잘할 수 있을거예요!

1000604744.english: - It is a beautiful sight. I am a little worried that the missing Valkyrie looked tired, though...
1000604744.korean: - 보기 좋은 광경이다. 사라진 발키리가 피곤해 보인 것이 조금 걱정이지만...

1000604745.english: Thank you. ...You're the only one who worries about me, Commander. Well then... I'll be going.
1000604745.korean: 고마워. ...날 걱정해주는건 사령관 밖에 없어. &n그럼... 다녀올게.

1000604746.english: - The interior of the Orca was once again filled with smoke as the bioroids cooked.
1000604746.korean: - 바이오로이드들이 조리를 하는통에 오르카 내부는 또다시 연기로 가득 찼다.

1000604747.english: - I'm sorry to say this to Fortune, but I think the ventilation system needs further modifications...
1000604747.korean: - 포츈에게는 미안하지만, 환풍 시설의 추가 개조가 필요할 것 같은데...

1000604749.english: Oh my, Commander. Did you find your sister?

1000604750.english: Hehe... Actually, I was watching what the Commander was doing, too.
1000604750.korean: 후후... 사실은 누나도 사령관이 뭘 하는지 지켜보고 있었거든.

1000604751.english: You're worried about the ventilation system, aren't you? It's okay. I'll take care of everything.
1000604751.korean: 지금 환풍 시설이 걱정인거지? 괜찮아. 누나가 다 알아서 해줄거거든?

1000604752.english: Our commander is keeping a close eye on the younger ones so they don't fight amongst themselves, you know?
1000604752.korean: 우리 사령관은 동생들끼리 싸우지 않도록 잘 지켜보는 거거든?

1000604753.english: Okay then, I'm off to work, so I'll just let you know the results later, okay? See you in a bit, Commander~
1000604753.korean: 그럼 누나는 일하러 갈테니까 나중에 결과만 알려주는 거거든?&n조금있다가 봐, 우리 사령관~

1000604754.english: - Orca operates thanks to the efforts of the bioroids working diligently behind the scenes like this. As the commander, I must never forget that fact.
1000604754.korean: - 오르카는 이렇게 보이지 않는 곳에서 열심히 일하는 바이오로이드들의&n활약으로 움직인다. 사령관인 나는 절대로 그 사실을 잊지 말아야 한다.

1000604755.english: - ...Anyway, the Valkyrie is running quite late... Will we be able to make it on time?
1000604755.korean: - ...그나저나 발키리가 꽤 늦는데... 시간에 맞출 수 있을까?

1000604756.english: I apologize. My mission was delayed, so I have only just returned.

1000604757.english: - Valkyrie looks somehow haggard. She is a slender beauty, but it bothers me that she always looks tired.
1000604757.korean: - 발키리는 어쩐지 초췌해 보인다. 늘씬한 미녀이지만, 늘 피로해 보이는게&n마음에 걸린다.

1000604758.english: - As soon as Valkyrie took her seat, she rested while staring blankly into the air with unfocused eyes.
1000604758.korean: - 발키리는 착석하자마자 초점 없는 눈으로 허공을 바라보며 휴식을 취했다.

1000604759.english: No problem. This is a mission entrusted to me, so I am simply doing my best.
1000604759.korean: 문제 없습니다. 이것도 제게 맡겨진 임무이니, 최선을 다 할 뿐입니다.

1000604761.english: - ... Was it because of the evaluation last time? The maids were so focused on their performance that they were making mistake after mistake.
1000604761.korean: - ... 저번의 품평 때문일까? 메이드들은 퍼포먼스에 집중한 나머지 실수를&n연발하고 있었다.

1000604762.english: These are the meatballs I prepared. Would you please try some?
1000604762.korean: 제가 준비한 미트볼이에요. 부디 맛을 봐주시겠어요?

1000604763.english: - These meatballs look appetizing at a glance. Warm steam is rising, and from the juicy meatballs, an incredibly spicy smell...
1000604763.korean: - 한눈에 봐도 먹음직스러워 보이는 미트볼이다. 따뜻한 김이 올라오고, 육즙을 잔뜩 머금은 미트볼에서 엄청나게 매운 냄새가...

1000604766.english: - Valkyrie gave a slight bow and took a bite of the meatball. Soon, her unfocused eyes began to wander aimlessly in the air.
1000604766.korean: - 발키리는 가볍게 목례를 한 뒤 미트볼을 한입 먹었다. &n이윽고 그녀의 초점 없는 눈동자가 갈 곳을 잃고 허공을 헤매기 시작했다.

1000604767.english: I figured it would be good to add a stimulating spicy flavor to food eaten in cold regions... It's, it's a performance. A performance!
1000604767.korean: 아무래도 추운 지방에서 먹는 음식엔 자극적인 매운맛을 더하는게 좋을 것 같아서요... 퍼, 퍼포먼스에요. 퍼포먼스!

1000604768.english: Is, is that so? Excellent, *cough*... Excellent. I'll give myself 10 points...
1000604768.korean: 그, 그렇습니까? 훌륭, 콜록... 훌륭합니다. 저는 10점...

1000604769.english: - Valkyrie could not bring herself to eat the rest of the meatballs and hung her head.
1000604769.korean: - 발키리는 차마 나머지 미트볼을 먹지 못하고 고개를 떨궜다.

1000604770.english: How could that be! There's no way I would make such a mistake!
1000604770.korean: 그럴수가! 설마 제가 그런 실수를 할 리 없어요!

1000604771.english: - Constantia took a bite of her meatball and ran off somewhere in a hurry.
1000604771.korean: - 콘스탄챠는 자신의 미트볼을 한 입 먹더니, 어디론가 급하게 달려갔다.

1000604772.english: Um... I tried making this, but I'm not sure if it suits your taste.
1000604772.korean: 저... 이거 만들어 봤는데, 입에 맞는지 모르겠어.

1000604773.english: - Valkyrie gulped down the water straight from the bottle, then bowed to Dutch Girl as if nothing were wrong.
1000604773.korean: - 발키리는 병째로 물을 들이켜다가, 아무렇지 않은 척 더치걸에게 목례했다.

1000604774.english: Thank you. I look forward to working with you.

1000604775.english: - It looks good. It doesn't smell spicy either. As expected of Dutch Girl...
1000604775.korean: - 괜찮아 보이는데? 매운 냄새도 안나고. 더치걸이 역시...

1000604776.english: - ...Instead of a spicy smell, is this...?

1000604777.english: I heard this is the best for work. And it said in a book that you drink this in cold places.
1000604777.korean: 일할 땐 이게 최고라 들었어. 그리고 추운곳에선 이걸 마신다고 책에 적혀있었어.

1000604778.english: - It's alcohol. And incredibly strong alcohol at that. It's clear that this meatball contains alcohol instead of meat juice.
1000604778.korean: - 술이다. 그것도 엄청나게 독한 술. 이 미트볼엔 육즙 대신 알콜이 들어있는 게 분명하다.

1000604779.english: Cough, cough! It's really... delicious. I'd give it 10 points...

1000604780.english: I guess I was wrong... Sorry...

1000604781.english: I'm fine... *Cough*! Please don't mind me... *Cough*.
1000604781.korean: 저는 괜찮으니... 콜록! 신경쓰지, 마십시오... 쿨럭.

1000604782.english: - Come to think of it, I don't see Sowan. Where did she go?
1000604782.korean: - 그리고보니 소완이 보이지 않는다. 어디로 간거지?

1000604783.english: This is my dish for this occasion. It may look ordinary on the outside, but it contains my special spices, so I am sure you will be satisfied.
1000604783.korean: 이번의 제 요리이옵니다. 겉보기엔 평범할지 모르나, 소첩의 특제 향신료가 들어갔으니 분명 만족하실것이옵니다.

1000604785.english: - Valkyrie began eating Sowan's meatballs, her cheeks flushed red from the alcohol. "Where, let me have a try too..."
1000604785.korean: - 발키리는 술기운으로 뺨을 발갛게 물들인 채 소완의 미트볼을 먹기 시작했다. &n어디, 나도 한 번...

1000604787.english: Master, I am at a loss for words. Then, please continue to enjoy the meal...
1000604787.korean: 주인께서 그리 말씀해주시니 소첩은 몸둘바를 모르겠사옵니다. &n그럼, 마저 요리를 즐겨주길...

1000604788.english: - After politely greeting them, Sowan approached Constantia and Dutch Girl, who were hanging their heads, and seemed to be giving them some advice.
1000604788.korean: - 소완은 공손히 인사를 남긴뒤, 고개를 떨구고 있는 콘스탄챠와 더치걸&n에게 다가가 무언가 조언같은걸 해주는듯 했다.

1000604789.english: When it comes to cooking... I think she is an excellent person.

1000604790.english: - Is that so... If it is the Valkyrie's eyes, I suppose they can be trusted. Then, the remaining personnel...
1000604790.korean: - 그런가... 발키리의 눈이라면 믿을만 하겠지. 그럼 이제 남은 인원이...

1000604792.english: I tried making a meat pie.

1000604793.english: Yes! It's going to be super delicious. You should try some, Master!
1000604793.korean: 넵! 엄청 맛있을거예요. 주인님도 드셔 보세요!

1000604794.english: - Valkyrie stuffed a mouthful of pie into her mouth without any change in expression.
1000604794.korean: - 발키리는 별다른 표정의 변화 없이 한입 가득 파이를 집어 넣었다.

1000604795.english: This is a truly excellent pie. I will give it 10 points.

1000604796.english: Waaah~! Hachiko finally succeeded! Please praise me, Master~!
1000604796.korean: 흐앙~! 하치코 드디어 성공했어요! 칭찬해 주세요 주인님~!

1000604797.english: I saw the sincerity of my colleagues. That is enough.
1000604797.korean: 저는 동료들의 성의를 보았습니다. 그것이면 충분합니다.

1000604798.english: It was a pleasant time. However, it is now time to return to the battlefield. So, I leave the rest to you, Your Excellency.
1000604798.korean: 즐거운 시간이었습니다. 하지만 이젠 전장으로 돌아가야 할 때입니다.&n그러니 나머지는 부탁드립니다, 각하.

1000604799.english: - Valkyrie packed everyone's food neatly into a cute-looking backpack and left the bridge.
1000604799.korean: - 발키리는 귀엽게 생긴 배낭에 모두의 음식을 차곡차곡 챙긴 뒤 함교를 빠져나갔다.

1000604800.english: Master! Then, is Hachiko first place?

1000604801.english: - I stroked Hachiko's head and fell into thought for a moment.
1000604801.korean: - 나는 하치코의 머리를 쓰다듬으며 잠시 생각에 빠졌다.

1000604802.english: - The final hour of the cooking competition has arrived.

1000604803.english: - This time, the special judge is none other than...

1000604804.english: I am T-20S Gnome. Nice to meet you all.

1000604805.english: - Gnome was a very polite bioroid.

1000604806.english: That is... my family. I think anything is fine as long as it is food that I can enjoy with the Steel Line family.
1000604806.korean: 그건... 저희 가족들. 스틸라인 가족들과 함께 즐길 수 있는 음식이면 뭐든지 좋다고 생각합니다.

1000604807.english: - Was standing on the podium a bit overwhelming? The gnome came straight down to the seat next to me.
1000604807.korean: - 단상에 서있는게 조금 부담스러웠던걸까? 노움은 곧장 내 옆자리로 내려왔다.

1000604809.english: - The quick-witted Perrault set off first. Constantia followed behind, constantly muttering 'restoring honor'.
1000604809.korean: - 눈치가 빠른 페로가 제일 먼저 출발했다. 콘스탄챠는 끊임없이 '명예회복'을&n중얼거리며 그 뒤를 따랐다.

1000604810.english: Hachiko is... um, I just remembered!

1000604811.english: Waaah! How did you know? As expected of you, Master!
1000604811.korean: 흐앙! 어떻게 아셨어요? 역시 주인님은 대단해요!

1000604813.english: ...Now everyone seems familiar with cooking. Isn't that right?
1000604813.korean: ...이제는 모두가 요리에 익숙해 보이옵니다. 그렇지 않사옵니까?

1000604814.english: - To be honest, I'm still scared of Sowan. Even though the gnome is right next to me...
1000604814.korean: - 솔직히 말하자면, 나는 아직 소완이 무섭다. 노움이 내 옆에 있긴 하지만...

1000604815.english: - The ominous image of Sowan slitting my throat with a blade won't stop.
1000604815.korean: - 소완이 날붙이로 내 목을 그어버리는, 그런 불길한 상상이 멈추질 않는다.

1000604816.english: - The awkward silence ended, and Sowan spoke with difficulty.
1000604816.korean: - 어색한 침묵이 끝나고 소완은 어렵게 입을 열었다.

1000604817.english: ...I am a bioroid created solely to gain Master's favor.
1000604817.korean: ...소첩은 오로지 주인의 총애를 얻기 위해 만들어진 바이오로이드이옵니다.

1000604818.english: It has been a lonely ascetic practice of decades. I have spared no means or methods to serve you, my master, the finest taste.
1000604818.korean: 수십 년간의 외로운 수행이었사옵니다. 소첩은 주인께 극상의 맛을 대접하기 위해 수단과 방법을 가리지 않았사옵니다.

1000604819.english: ... However, I failed to truly obtain Master's sincerity.
1000604819.korean: ... 하지만, 정작 주인의 진심을 구하는것엔 실패했사옵니다.

1000604820.english: I know that the rift of misunderstanding between my master and me is already deep, and that my sincere feelings will not be conveyed to you.
1000604820.korean: 이미 소첩과 주인 사이에는 오해의 골이 깊어, 소첩의 진심은 주인께 전해지지 않을 것을 알고 있사옵니다.

1000604821.english: There is only one reason. Solely... to gain the favor of the one who will become my master... and even if... that method is not right...
1000604821.korean: 이유는 하나. 오직... 제 주인이 되실분의 총애를 받기 위함...&n설령... 그 방법이 옳지 않다고 한들...

1000604822.english: - Sowan does not answer my question, but simply smiles.
1000604822.korean: - 소완은 내 질문에 답하지 않고, 빙긋 웃을 뿐이다.

1000604823.english: Admitting that I am wrong... is too heavy for my narrow mind...
1000604823.korean: 소첩이 틀렸음을 인정하는것은... 소첩의 좁은 마음으로는 버겁기에...

1000604824.english: I will be leaving after this festival.

1000604825.english: But by any chance, if I can learn one last thing here...
1000604825.korean: 하지만 혹여, 소첩이 이곳에서 마지막으로 무언가를 배울 수 있다면...

1000604826.english: - The same venom as before is not felt in Sowan's footsteps.
1000604826.korean: - 소완의 발걸음에는 예전같은 독기가 느껴지질 않는다.

1000604827.english: - Sowan walked past the gnome and sat next to me, and the gnome's nervous fingers were slowly moving toward the control stick.
1000604827.korean: - 소완은 노움을 지나쳐 내 옆자리에 앉았고, 긴장한 노움의 손가락은 천천히&n조정간으로 향하고 있었다.

1000604828.english: - Sowan seemed to have something left to say, but there was no more time to waste. I opened the command console to support the maids.
1000604828.korean: - 소완은 뭔가 남은 말이 있는듯 했지만, 더이상 지체할 시간이 없다. 나는&n메이드들을 지원하기 위해 지휘 콘솔을 열었다.

1000604830.english: - The maids, having caught their breath, turned their gaze toward Sowan, who was sitting next to me. At the same time, they each drew out their weapons.
1000604830.korean: - 숨을 고르던 메이드들의 시선이 내 옆에 앉은 소완에게 향했다. 그와 동시에, 그녀들은 각자의 무장을 꺼내 들었다.

1000604831.english: Grrr! Get away from your master!

1000604832.english: ...I hadn't seen you for a while, but I see you were still here.
1000604832.korean: ...내내 모습이 보이질 않더니, 여기에 남아 있었군요.

1000604834.english: - Sowan obediently followed. As expected, one could feel that Sowan's dangerous aura had softened considerably.
1000604834.korean: - 소완은 순순히 따랐다. 역시 소완의 위험했던 분위기가 많이 누그러진것을&n느낄 수 있었다.

1000604835.english: Ahem... Then, would you all please start cooking?
1000604835.korean: 흠흠... 그러면 다들 요리를 시작해 주시겠습니까?

1000604836.english: Ah! Then then, Hachiko is the first to start!
1000604836.korean: 앗! 그러면그러면, 하치코가 제일 먼저 시작이에요!

1000604838.english: - Orca's maids, already blinded by the competition, began running to their respective places, and flames that seemed unrelated to cooking shot out from everywhere.
1000604838.korean: - 이미 승부에 눈이 멀어버린 오르카의 메이드들은 각자의 자리로 달려가기&n시작했고, 요리와 상관 없어 보이는 불꽃이 곳곳에서 뿜어져 나왔다.

1000604839.english: Commander, you have always been with your family.

1000604840.english: The way I see it, family is... sitting around in one place, sharing a meal...
1000604840.korean: 제가 생각하는 가족이란... 한곳에 둘러 앉아, 식사를...

1000604842.english: Step back. Hachiko, where is the fire extinguisher?

1000604844.english: Zone 2 is wrong! Sister, please lower the bulkhead!

1000604845.english: No way! I haven't even started cooking yet! I'll definitely make up for it this time!
1000604845.korean: 안 돼요! 아직 요리를 시작하지도 못했는걸요! 이번에야말로 만회하고 말겠어요!

1000604846.english: Snap out of it, unnie! Go back to the control room immediately!

1000604848.english: Commander, I will use foamed concrete.

1000604849.english: - The fire that spread from the oven burned for a long time, burning expensive equipment, and the bioroids sat slumped with gloomy expressions.
1000604849.korean: - 오븐에서 번진 화재는 오랫동안 타오르며 값비싼 기기들을 태웠고, &n바이오로이드들은 침울한 표정으로 주저앉아 있었다.

1000604850.english: Hachiko... Hachiko ruined everything... I'm sorry...

1000604851.english: Thank you for your hard work. Fortunately, the food is fine.

1000604853.english: - That must be because Sowan ran around everywhere moving the food to a safe place...
1000604853.korean: - 그건 소완이 여기저기 뛰어다니며 요리를 안전한곳으로 옮겼기 때문이겠지...

1000604854.english: - The fire has been extinguished for now. I feel bad for Fortune, who is working hard to clean up the mess, but the tournament has to go on...
1000604854.korean: - 화재는 일단 진압됐다. &n열심히 뒷처리를 하고 있는 포츈에게는 미안하지만, 대회는 계속 진행해야 하니까...

1000604856.english: - I made a big fuss, but my stomach is so full it feels like it's about to burst, so I don't think I can eat anything more.
1000604856.korean: - 큰소리는 쳤지만 내 배는 지금 가득차다 못해 터질 지경이라 더이상 아무것도 먹질 못할것 같다.

1000604858.english: Surely... you aren't saying the capacity is full, are you? Is your stomach as small as your generosity?
1000604858.korean: 설마... 용량이 가득 찼다고 말하시는건 아니겠지요?&n위장도 도량만큼이나 작은 건가요?

1000604859.english: - Angry murmurs can be heard from here and there. Let's think of a way...
1000604859.korean: - 여기저기에서 성난 웅성거림이 들려온다. 방법을 생각해 보자...

1000604860.english: - Right...! This might be a good method.

1000604861.english: - Sowan seemed unable to accept the situation.
1000604861.korean: - 소완은 이 상황을 받아들이지 못한것 같았다.

1000604862.english: Are you serious? I can't believe it. Have you forgotten everything that happened to you, Master?
1000604862.korean: 진심이십니까? 믿을 수 없습니다. 주인님께 무슨 일이 있었는지 전부 잊으셨나요?

1000604863.english: Hehe~ Hachiko has prepared a delicious meat pie. Gnome, please try it first!
1000604863.korean: 헤헹~ 하치코는 맛있는 미트 파이를 준비했어요. 노움부터 먼저 먹어보세요!

1000604864.english: That's not important right now, Hachiko! And that's a coward! My hot pot comes first!
1000604864.korean: 지금 그게 중요한게 아니에요, 하치코! 그리고 비겁해요!&n제 전골이 우선입니다!

1000604865.english: - The maids vying with one another to shove their undercooked dishes at Gnome and Sowan...
1000604865.korean: - 앞다투어 자신들의 설익은 요리를 노움과 소완에게 들이미는 메이드들...

1000604867.english: - Finally, it is time to announce the tasting results.

1000604868.english: Yes, everything was delicious. The results were all perfect scores.
1000604868.korean: 네, 모두 맛있었습니다. 결과는 모두 만점이에요.

1000604870.english: How could this be! To think my cooking and Hachiko's cooking are on the same level. I can't accept this! I request some more sophisticated judges.
1000604870.korean: 어떻게 그럴수가! 제 요리와 하치코의 요리가 동급이라니. 납득할 수 없어요!&n좀 더 고급스러운 심사위원을 부탁 드립니다.

1000604871.english: Sowan has also agreed. Congratulations to everyone.

1000604872.english: Tied for first place? This is absolutely the worst! I shouldn't have entered this competition!
1000604872.korean: 공동 1등이라니. 정말 최악이에요! 이런 대회... 참가하는게 아니었는데!

1000604873.english: Miss Vanilla? Where are you going?

1000604875.english: - There are times when Orca has no choice but to surface to procure items that cannot be obtained from the sea.
1000604875.korean: - 오르카는 바다에서 구할 수 없는 물품을 조달하기 위해 어쩔 수 없이&n부상해야 할 때가 있다.

1000604876.english: - And in the current situation, no matter how much preparation is done, there is no choice but to be exposed to the threat of the Iron bug.
1000604876.korean: - 그리고 지금같은 상황에서는 아무리 준비를 한들, 철충의 위협에&n노출될 수 밖에 없는 상태다.

1000604878.english: It's Iron bug bombardment! Everyone, get ready! Strike team members, head to the sortie port immediately!
1000604878.korean: 철충의 포격입니다! 모두 대비하세요! 타격팀 멤버들은 즉시 출격 포트로!

1000604879.english: Hachiko is ready to go! Let's go!

1000604880.english: Another raid? There is no place in the world safe from Iron bug...
1000604880.korean: 또 습격이라니, 세상 어디에도 철충에게서 안전한 곳 따위는...

1000604881.english: As you can see, I don't have the budget to throw a separate farewell party. Well then, goodbye.
1000604881.korean: 보다시피, 따로 작별 파티는 해줄 여유가 없네요. 그럼 잘가세요.

1000604883.english: - Sowan was staring blankly at the Orca personnel as they sortied. I lowered my visor and spoke to Sowan.
1000604883.korean: - 소완은 물끄러미 오르카 인원들의 출격을 바라보고 있다. &n나는 바이저를 내리며 소완에게 말을 걸었다.

1000604884.english: I have a request for my master.

1000604885.english: Would you allow me to provide support from the rear?
1000604885.korean: 소첩이 후방에서 지원을 할 수 있게 허락해 주시겠사옵니까?

1000604886.english: - I mustered the courage to look Sowan straight in the eye. In her sharp gaze, I could feel her sincerity...
1000604886.korean: - 나는 용기를 내서 소완의 눈을 똑바로 쳐다봤다. 그녀의 날카로운 눈매&n속에서 나는 그녀의 진심을 느낄수...

1000604887.english: - ...There is no way I have the talent to read people's true feelings. There is no way I know what she is thinking.
1000604887.korean: - …내게 진심을 읽는 재주따위가 있을 리 없지. 그녀가 무슨 생각을 하는지&n알 도리가 없다.

1000604888.english: Since there are still aspects I do not fully understand, I humbly submit this request.
1000604888.korean: 아직도 소첩이 납득하지 못한점이 남아있기에, 이렇게 청을 드리옵니다.

1000604889.english: - Seeing Sowan's much softer attitude, I found myself giving in without realizing it.
1000604889.korean: - 훨씬 누그러진 소완의 자세에 나도 모르게 허락하고 말았다.

1000604890.english: ...Thank you for your permission. I will be going now. And... tea is ready, so please feel free to have some...
1000604890.korean: ...허락해주셔서 감사하옵니다. 그럼 다녀오겠사옵니다. 그리고...&n차는 준비되어 있으니. 언제든지 드시길...

1000604891.english: - There was a moderately warmed cup of tea next to me, though I didn't know when it had been placed there.
1000604891.korean: - 언제 가져다 놓았는지, 내 옆엔 적당히 데워진 차가 있었다.

1000604893.english: I sensed a different presence behind me and almost got into danger. Aren't you taking combat too lightly?
1000604893.korean: 후방에서 다른 기척이 느껴져서 하마터면 위험할 뻔 했어요.&n전투를 너무 우습게 보는것 아닌가요?

1000604894.english: - Perrault glares fiercely at Sowan. The atmosphere is ominous.
1000604894.korean: - 페로가 소완을 매섭게 노려본다. 분위기가 심상치 않군.

1000604895.english: It seems my skills have rusted here. I didn't realize my movements had become so sluggish that a cat could detect my presence...
1000604895.korean: 아무래도 이곳에서 제 실력이 녹슨 것 같사옵니다.&n고양이에게 기척을 들킬정도로 몸놀림이 둔해졌을줄은...

1000604896.english: ...Hmph. I'll go wash up first. Hachiko, don't take your eyes off Master.
1000604896.korean: ...흥. 저는 먼저 씻고 오겠습니다. 하치코는 주인님에게서 눈을 떼지 마세요.

1000604897.english: Hehe, so Master, your knee belongs to Hachiko? I love it so much~
1000604897.korean: 헤헤, 그럼 주인님 무릎은 하치코 거네요? 너무 좋아요~

1000604898.english: Aww~ Please pet Hachiko lots and lots today too~
1000604898.korean: 흐앙~ 오늘도 하치코 많이 많이 쓰다듬어 주세요~

1000604899.english: To think it would run at its owner in such a filthy state...
1000604899.korean: 저리도 지저분한 차림으로 주인께 달려 들다니...

1000604901.english: May I ask why? Even with all the abilities I possess, I was unable to win my master's heart.
1000604901.korean: 어째서인지 여쭈어 봐도 되겠사옵니까? &n소첩이 가진 모든 능력으로도 주인의 마음을 얻을 수 없었사옵니다.

1000604902.english: - I can sense a slight resentment from Sowan toward me.
1000604902.korean: - 소완에게서 나를 향한 약간의 원망이 느껴진다.

1000604903.english: I have used every trick in the book solely for my master's pleasure... Why...
1000604903.korean: 소첩은 오로지 주인의 쾌락만을 위해 모든 수를 써왔는데... 어찌하여...

1000604904.english: I cannot understand what you mean...
1000604904.korean: 무슨 말씀이시온지... 소첩은 이해할 수 없사옵니다…

1000604905.english: - I drank the tea Sowan had prepared in one gulp.
1000604905.korean: - 나는 소완이 준비해둔 차를 단숨에 마셨다.

1000604906.english: Master... do you trust this humble servant?

1000604909.english: I really can't take my eyes off you for even a moment. If you don't hurry back to the galley, I'm planning to shoot you a few times.
1000604909.korean: 정말 한시도 눈을 뗄 수가 없군요. 어서 조리실로 돌아가지 않으면 몇 발 정도 쏴 드릴 생각입니다.

1000604910.english: - It seems unlikely I will be able to leisurely enjoy the sunshine at Orca for the time being, as I will be mediating here and there.
1000604910.korean: - 당분간 이곳저곳을 중재하느라 오르카에서 여유롭게 햇볕을 구경하기는&n힘들 것 같다.

1000604911.english: - However, I suppose it's okay to look forward to dinner tonight.
1000604911.korean: - 다만, 오늘 저녁 식사 정도는 기대해도 괜찮겠지.

1000604912.english: The key is 'performance'. Only when you can captivate even Master's eyes can you be called a true Orca chef.
1000604912.korean: 요점은 '퍼포먼스'. 주인의 시각까지 사로잡을 수 있어야 진정한 오르카의 요리사라고 할 수 있사옵니다.

1000604913.english: Hmph, as expected, that is a devious idea.

1000604914.english: Does this mean you're trying to attract attention because you're not confident in the taste?
1000604914.korean: 맛에 자신이 없으니 시선이라도 끌어보겠다는 뜻인가요?

1000604915.english: No, Master likes Hachiko's meat pie the best!
1000604915.korean: 아니에요. 주인님은 하치코의 미트 파이를 제일 좋아하세요!

1000604916.english: And as expected, Hachiko's pie looks the tastiest, doesn't it?
1000604916.korean: 그리고 역시 하치코는 파이가 제일 맛있어 보이는걸요?

1000604919.english: I simply cannot take those words lightly. I believe Miss Hachiko needs to learn to cook other dishes besides meat pies.
1000604919.korean: 그 말은 도저히 흘려들을 수 없사옵니다. &n하치코 양은 미트 파이 말고 다른 요리도 배워야 한다고 생각하옵니다.

1000604921.english: It's a shame, but I think Sowan is right.
1000604921.korean: 안타깝지만, 그건 소완의 말이 맞다고 생각해요.

1000604922.english: If you intend to serve you for the rest of your life with only one type of food, stop right now. You are worthy of delicious food.
1000604922.korean: 한 가지 음식만으로 주인님을 평생 모실 생각이라면 지금이라도 그만두세요.&n주인님은 맛있는 음식을 드실 자격이 있는분이니까요.

1000604923.english: I understand that Miss Vanilla, as you say, does not know how to cook any food other than chocolate cake...
1000604923.korean: 그렇게 말씀하시는 바닐라 양도, 초코케이크 말고는 달리 할 줄 아는 음식이 없는것으로 알고 있사옵니다만...

1000604924.english: In the first place, isn't that cake nothing more than excavating fossils heavily laden with the preservatives of ancient humans?
1000604924.korean: 애당초, 그 케익이라는것도 옛 인간님들의 방부제가 듬뿍 담긴 화석을 발굴해 내는것 뿐이지 않사옵니까?

1000604925.english: Hmph! That is because, as a maid favored by my Master, I have a duty to cater to his tastes. Is there a problem?
1000604925.korean: 흥! 그건 주인님께 총애받는 메이드로서, 주인님의 입맛에 맞출 의무가&n있기 때문이죠. 무슨 문제라도 있나요?

1000604926.english: ...Why do you not think that the maids here make the food Master would like themselves? I cannot understand.
1000604926.korean: ...어째서 이곳의 메이드들은 주인께서 좋아하실 음식을 직접 만든다는 생각을 하지 못하시는 것이옵니까? 이해할 수 없사옵니다.

1000604927.english: As expected, Master likes Hachiko Pie the best!
1000604927.korean: 역시 주인님은 하치코 파이를 제일 좋아하세요!

1000604928.english: ...Hachiko, please be quiet for a moment.

1000604930.english: It seems the only way is to show you in person. Tonight, I will win the host's heart with a meal made using the freshest ingredients.
1000604930.korean: 직접 보여드리는 수밖에 없을 것 같사옵니다. &n오늘 저녁, 최고로 신선한 재료를 사용해 만든 식사로 주인의 마음을 사로잡겠사옵니다.

1000604931.english: And... as expected, you are tiring to deal with, so would you please refrain from speaking to me for the time being?
1000604931.korean: 그리고... 역시 당신은 상대하기 피곤하오니, 당분간 제게 말을 걸지 말아주시겠사옵니까?

1000604932.english: ...I will shatter all misunderstandings related to me, along with your pride.
1000604932.korean: ...저와 관련된 모든 오해는 당신의 자존심과 함께 부숴드리죠.

1000604933.english: Hahaha... If you have the ability to do that...

1000604935.english: - Orca's day is too short for me.

1000604936.english: - Rescuing and uniting bioroids in danger, and rearming them...
1000604936.korean: - 위험에 빠진 바이오로이드들을 구해서 규합하고, 재무장 시키며...

1000604937.english: - You must hold meetings with commanders and constantly research countermeasures against raids that could strike at any time.
1000604937.korean: - 지휘관들과 회의를 열어 언제 들이닥칠지 모르는 습격에 대한 대책을 끊임없이 연구해야만 한다.

1000604938.english: - However, it is not always about handling such heavy and serious matters.
1000604938.korean: - 하지만, 늘 그렇게 무겁고 심각한 일만 처리하는건 아니다.

1000604939.english: - While operating the command console here, you can occasionally see bizarre sights that make you doubt your eyes.
1000604939.korean: - 이곳에서 지휘콘솔을 조작하고 있자면, 눈을 의심하게 되는&n기묘한 광경도 가끔씩 볼 수 있다.

1000604941.english: - On the display, the image of three maids roaming freely through a high-risk urban area appears.
1000604941.korean: - 디스플레이에서는 고위험 도시 지역을 멋대로 헤집고 다니는 세명의&n메이드들이 모습이 떠올라 있다.

1000604943.english: Master, I am innocent. All of this is due to Miss Vanilla's provocation...
1000604943.korean: 주인. 소첩은 억울하옵니다. 이 모든일은 바닐라 양이 도발을...

1000604944.english: You always blame everything on me.

1000604945.english: - Sowan, who sneaked out of the search team to harvest weeds.
1000604945.korean: - 수색팀에서 몰래 빠져나와 잡풀을 수확하는 소완.

1000604946.english: - Vanilla slips into the camera's blind spot with skillful movements.
1000604946.korean: - 노련한 몸놀림으로 카메라의 사각지대로 빠져나가는 바닐라.

1000604947.english: - Hachiko kicks the cans lying on the roadside one by one with her foot.
1000604947.korean: - 길가에 떨어져 있는 통조림을 하나씩 발로 건드려보는 하치코.

1000604948.english: Master! That isn't spoiled! I checked!
1000604948.korean: 주인님! 저건 상한게 아니에요! 제가 확인했어요!

1000604949.english: - I turned off the power to the display.

1000604950.english: - The maids being scolded all hung their heads low.
1000604950.korean: - 꾸지람을 듣는 메이드들은 하나같이 고개를 푹 숙이고 있었다.

1000604952.english: - As the awkward silence dragged on, passing Orca members glanced this way.
1000604952.korean: - 불편한 침묵이 길어지자 지나가는 오르카 대원들이 이쪽을 힐끔거렸다.

1000604953.english: - ...I guess I should wrap this up properly. I can't just pretend not to know how the maids feel.
1000604953.korean: - ...적당히 끝내야겠지. 메이드들의 마음을 모른척 할 수도 없는 일이니까.

1000604956.english: - The maids' expressions brightened in an instant. And Sowan disappeared into the kitchen before I could even finish speaking.
1000604956.korean: - 메이드들은 순식간에 표정이 밝아졌다. 그리고 소완은 내 말이 채 끝나기도 전에 주방으로 사라졌다.

1000604958.english: Master, I'm sorry... Hachiko couldn't pick anything up today...
1000604958.korean: 주인님, 죄송해요... 하치코는 오늘 아무것도 못 주웠어요...

1000604960.english: I shall inform you in advance. I will not permit you to follow me around.
1000604960.korean: 미리 말씀드리겠사옵니다. 소첩을 따라다니시는 건 허락하지 않겠사옵니다.

1000604961.english: That is what I should be saying.

1000604962.english: Hachiko, you're going to succeed today!

1000604963.english: - The three of them bickered as they left the bridge.

1000604964.english: - Well... everyone is competent, so I'm sure they'll handle it. Then, for now, I'll... the backlog of work...
1000604964.korean: - 뭐... 다들 유능하니까 잘해내겠지. 그럼 난 일단 밀린 업무를...

1000604965.english: Sigh, Commander. Is this a new hobby you've picked up lately?
1000604965.korean: 에휴, 사령관. 이건 요즘 새로 생긴 취미야?

1000604966.english: Look at this. There are cooks assigned to the search team. This is what the Commander thought, right?
1000604966.korean: 이것 좀 봐봐. 수색팀에 요리사들이 편성 되어있잖아.&n이거 사령관 생각 맞지?

1000604967.english: Haa... I knew it. How can you be so bad at lying? Anyway, if you get in the way of the mission, I'll kick you all out, so you better watch out.
1000604967.korean: 하아... 그럴 줄 알았어. 어쩜 이렇게 거짓말을 못해? &n아무튼, 임무에 걸리적 거리면 전부 걷어 차줄테니까 알아서 해.

1000604968.english: Well then, I'm going. Don't forget to fill the bathwater. You know that, right?
1000604968.korean: 그럼 난 간다. 목욕물 받아놓는 거 까먹으면 안 돼. 알지?

1000604969.english: - Miho waved her hand as if she didn't want to hear any more and walked out of the bridge.
1000604969.korean: - 미호는 더 듣기 싫다는 듯 손을 흔들며 함교를 빠져 나갔다.

1000604970.english: - As soon as the conversation with Miho ended, my concentration scattered for no reason.
1000604970.korean: - 미호와의 이야기가 끝나자 이유없이 집중력이 흩어졌다.

1000604972.english: - Let me tell you in advance, I end up going through a terrible ordeal because of an accident that happened later.
1000604972.korean: - 미리 말해두자면, 나는 이후에 벌어진 사고 때문에 끔찍한 일을 겪게된다.

1000604973.english: - If only I had focused a little more. If only I had done my best as the commander...
1000604973.korean: - 내가 조금만 더 집중했더라면. 사령관으로서 최선을 다 했더라면...

1000604974.english: - They probably could have found it.

1000604975.english: - The scene where Hachiko, who went out on a search, digs up a 'purple mushroom' and puts it in her apron pocket...
1000604975.korean: - 수색을 나간 하치코가 '보라색 버섯'을 캐내 앞치마 주머니에 넣는 장면을...

1000604976.english: Master, how was it? You were surely satisfied, weren't you?

1000604977.english: Would you like to try the food I have prepared as well?

1000604979.english: - While stuffing the food Vanilla and Sowan had prepared into their mouths, Hachiko hesitated and spoke.
1000604979.korean: - 바닐라와 소완이 준비한 요리를 입 속에 쑤셔넣고 있는 와중에 하치코가 우물쭈물하며 말을 걸었다.

1000604980.english: Um, Master... Hachiko made something new... Would you mind having some...?
1000604980.korean: 저, 주인님... 하치코가 새로운걸 만들어 봤는데... 드셔 주실 수 있나요...?

1000604983.english: - A slice of purple pie was beautifully placed on the plate that Hachiko carefully took out.
1000604983.korean: - 하치코가 조심스럽게 꺼낸 플레이트 위엔 보랏빛이 도는 파이 한조각이 예쁘게 얹혀 있었다.

1000604984.english: - I happily took a bite of the pie. But... Hachiko's purple pie was something beyond my expectations.
1000604984.korean: - 기쁘게 파이를 한 입 베어물었다. 하지만...&n...하치코의 보라색 파이는 내 예상을 뛰어넘는 무언가였다.

1000604985.english: - Since it was purple, I naturally assumed it was a pie sweetened and flavored with fruit. But then... what on earth...
1000604985.korean: - 보라색이니까, 난 당연히 과일로 단맛과 향을 낸 파이라고 생각했다.&n그런데 이런 대체...

1000604986.english: I added mushrooms for you, Master! You're tired of meat, aren't you? I have plenty, so I'll bring more!
1000604986.korean: 주인님을 위해서 버섯을 넣어 봤어요! 고기는 질리셨죠?&n잔뜩 있으니까 더 가져올게요!

1000604987.english: - ...Ah. What a strange taste... So much so that my mouth tingles...

1000604988.english: - I felt something was wrong here.
1000604988.korean: - 여기서 난 뭔가 잘못된 것을 느꼈다.

1000604991.english: - Along with severe nausea, cold sweat pours down like rain.
1000604991.korean: - 심한 구토감과 함께, 식은땀이 비오듯 쏟아진다.

1000604993.english: Master, it is Sowan. Can you hear me?!

1000604994.english: - Along with the strange experience of my tongue stiffening, I collapsed right then and there without even having a chance to reassure the bioroids.
1000604994.korean: - 혀가 뻣뻣하게 굳는 기묘한 경험과 함께 나는 바이오로이드들을 안심시킬 새도 없이 그대로 쓰러지고 말았다.

1000604995.english: - I can't put any strength into my body. I... why am I like this...?
1000604995.korean: - 몸에 힘이 전혀 들어가지 않는다. 나는... 왜 이러고 있지...?

1000604996.english: ... So, this time, I'll believe you.

1000604997.english: So that 'antidote' ultimately means a mushroom, right?

1000604998.english: Would I tell a lie regarding the life and death of my master, which is more important than my own? Time is running out, so I beg you to hurry.
1000604998.korean: 소첩이 소첩의 목숨보다 중한 주인의 생사를 두고 거짓을 고하겠습니까?&n시간이 촉박하니 서두르시길 바라옵니다.

1000605000.english: ...Your Master will be fine, Miss Hachiko. I will certainly ensure that this happens, so please read this book by my side, Miss Hachiko.
1000605000.korean: ...주인께선 괜찮을 것이옵니다, 하치코 양. 소첩이 반드시 그리되게 할 것이니, 하치코 양은 제 옆에서 이 책을 읽어주시지요.

1000605002.english: We will go to get the antidote.

1000605003.english: know this is a difficult request for you right now, Master... but please, give me the order...
1000605003.korean: 지금 주인님께는 어려운 부탁인것은 알지만... 부디 명령을...

1000605004.english: - I didn't even have the strength left to answer, so I could barely wiggle my hand.
1000605004.korean: - 대답할 기력조차 남지 않아 간신히 손만 까딱일 수 있었다.

1000605007.english: Then, everyone, please get ready to sortie! Time is of the essence.
1000605007.korean: 그럼 모두 출격 준비를 해주세요! 한시가 급합니다.
